# 6.1 House Votes API Client

Extends `CongressGovPaginatedClient` for House vote endpoints. Fetches vote list items (paginated) and vote member positions (detail).

## Classes

### `HouseVotesApiClient[F[_]]`

```
class HouseVotesApiClient[F[_]: Async](
  config: CongressGovClientConfig,
  httpClient: Client[F],
  retryWrapper: RetryWrapper[F],
  logger: PipelineLogger[F]
) extends CongressGovPaginatedClient[F, VoteListItemDTO] {

  override def fetchPage(params: FetchParams): F[PagedResponse[VoteListItemDTO]]

  def fetchMembers(congress: Int, session: Int, voteNumber: Int): F[VoteMembersDTO]
}
```

**`fetchPage` behavior:**
- URL: `{baseUrl}/house-vote/{congress}/{session}?offset={offset}&limit={pageSize}&fromDateTime={fromDateTime}&toDateTime={toDateTime}&sort=updateDate+desc&format=json&api_key={apiKey}`
- Decodes JSON â†’ `PagedResponse[VoteListItemDTO]`
- Applies `config.pageDelay` between pages
- Classifies HTTP errors via `CongressGovErrorClassifier`, retries transient errors

**`fetchMembers` behavior:**
- URL: `{baseUrl}/house-vote/{congress}/{session}/{voteNumber}/members?format=json&api_key={apiKey}`
- Decodes JSON â†’ `VoteMembersDTO` (includes `voteQuestion`, `results: List[VoteResultDTO]`)
- Primary detail endpoint for constructing `VoteDO` + `List[VotePositionDO]`
- Separate method because members endpoint returns different type than list item type

### `HouseVotesConfig`

```
final case class HouseVotesConfig(
  congress: Int,
  session: Int,
  parallelism: Int = 4,
  pageDelay: FiniteDuration = 500.millis,
  lookbackDays: Int = 7
)
```

### Error Types

```
final case class HouseVoteFetchFailed(
  congress: Int,
  session: Int,
  voteNumber: Option[Int],
  detail: String,
  cause: Option[Throwable] = None
) extends Exception(
  s"Failed to fetch House vote (congress=$congress, session=$session${voteNumber.map(v => s", vote=$v").getOrElse("")}): $detail",
  cause.orNull
)
```

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `fetchPage` returns paginated `VoteListItemDTO` list | Mock API returns page of votes â†’ correctly decoded |
| `fetchAll` paginates until `items.size < pageSize` | Mock 3 pages (250, 250, 50) â†’ all 550 items collected |
| `fetchMembers` returns `VoteMembersDTO` with positions | Mock members endpoint â†’ DTO with results list decoded |
| `fetchMembers` includes `voteQuestion` field | Mock response with "On Passage" â†’ field populated |
| API key included on every request | Inspect outgoing requests â†’ `api_key` query param present |
| `fromDateTime` filter applied to list requests | Verify query string includes `fromDateTime` parameter |
| HTTP 429 classified as Transient and retried | Mock 429 â†’ retried â†’ succeeds on attempt 2 |
| HTTP 500/502/503 classified as Transient | Verify `CongressGovErrorClassifier.classify` returns Transient |
| HTTP 401/403 classified as Systemic (no retry) | Verify immediate failure |
| HTTP 404 for specific vote â†’ `HouseVoteFetchFailed` | Mock 404 â†’ error with congress/session/voteNumber context |
| Page delay respected between pages | 100ms delay, 3 pages â†’ elapsed â‰Ą 200ms |
| Timeout applies per-request | Mock slow response â†’ `TimeoutException` |
| `HouseVoteFetchFailed` includes congress, session, vote number context | Verify error message contains all identifiers |
